title: School-Level Poverty in Education Survey Research: Can Free or Reduced-Price Lunch Be Substituted as a Weighting Variable by Other, More Reliable Measures?
summary_en: The purpose of this exploratory study was to examine the potential utility of school-level poverty measures other than free or reduced-price lunch for achieving population representativeness in survey weighting.
title_cn: 《校级教育贫困调查研究：免费或减价午餐作为加权变量可否由其他更可靠测算指标替代？》
summary_cn: 近期，教育领域专项研究团队就校级教育贫困测算相关问题开展专题研究，核心研究议题为现行用于衡量校级贫困水平的免费或减价午餐加权变量，是否可由其他可靠性更高的测算指标予以替代。

title: Contingency Frameworks for Future U.S.-China Cooperation on AI Assurance and Security: Preserving Strategic Optionality
summary_en: The author aims to inform artificial intelligence contingency planning under the premise that preserving strategic optionality for future U.S.-China engagement serves U.S. interests. He proposes five potential lines of effort for doing so.
title_cn: 《美中未来人工智能保障与安全合作应急框架：保留战略选择空间》
summary_cn: 近期，相关国际教育与科技政策研究主体发布题为《美中未来人工智能保障与安全合作应急框架：保留战略选择空间》的研究成果，聚焦中美两国教育领域人工智能安全保障合作的机制设计问题展开论述。

title: Open-Weight AI Models Require Proportional Evaluation Approaches
summary_en: Open-weight AI models (OWMs) introduce distinct risk factors for which existing evaluation practices, largely designed for closed-weight model deployment, fail to account. The authors propose proportional evaluation approaches for OWMs.
title_cn: 开源权重人工智能模型需采用相匹配的评估方法
summary_cn: 近期，教育领域围绕开源权重人工智能模型应用管理相关研究形成明确结论，指出针对该类模型的评估工作需采用与模型定位、应用场景相匹配的实施方式，保障评估结果科学严谨，契合教育领域实际使用需求。
